title: Dimension Table Update Methods
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision process and methods for handling updates to dimension tables in a data warehouse.
relationships: A new or updated Source System Record is compared against the Existing Dimension Record. If it's a new record, it's inserted. If it's an update, a decision is made: Type 1 directly overwrites the Existing Dimension Record, Type 2 creates a New Row, and Type 3 adds a new column to track the change, resulting in an Updated Dimension Record.
